thesis: After fixing the SMA initial-entry bug, retest SPY trend-following with a clean control, tighten windows to raise signal density, and check whether the edge generalizes to QQQ and VOO.

candidates.hypothesis: SPY 50/200 remains the control after the template fix and should now express a full trend-following exposure profile.
notes: Uses the fixed SMA initial-entry logic.

candidates.hypothesis: A moderately faster SPY 40/180 crossover may preserve trend quality while increasing trade count.
A faster SPY 30/150 crossover may improve responsiveness further, at the risk of more whipsaw.
QQQ 50/200 tests whether the apparent trend edge is really a growth-heavy index effect rather than SPY-specific behavior.
notes: Cross-symbol validation using local QQQ daily data.

candidates.hypothesis: VOO 50/200 tests whether the trend result persists on a SPY-like broad market proxy with a different fund structure.
notes: Cross-symbol validation using local VOO daily data.
